{{documentation}}
An infobox describing a weapon. This should be used for weapons, in addition to [[Template:Infobox Item]].

==Usage==
<pre>
{{Infobox Weapon
|power = weapon power level
|durability = weapon normal maximum durability
|damagetype = damage type done by the weapon
|attackstyle = weapon attack style
|basedmg = base damage of the weapon
|damagemulti = damage multiplier of the weapon, used internally to calculate the damage
|block = block value of the weapon
|criticalchance = critical hit chance increase
|combo = number of hits in the weapon combo
|specialaction = name of the special action - describe it in more detail in the article body
|reloadspeed = reload speed in seconds (e.g., 2.0 seconds)
}}
</pre>

==Example==
<pre>
{{Infobox Weapon
|power = 1
|durability = 700
|damagetype = crush
|attackstyle = main hand
|basedmg = 7 - 13
|damagemulti = 1
|block = 13
|criticalchance = 0
|combo = 3
|specialaction = Special Attack
|reloadspeed = 2.0 seconds
}}</pre>

{{Infobox Weapon
|power = 1
|durability = 700
|damagetype = crush
|attackstyle = main hand
|basedmg = 7 - 13
|damagemulti = 1
|block = 13
|criticalchance = 0
|combo = 3
|specialaction = Special Attack
|reloadspeed = 2.0 seconds
}}

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"power": {
			"label": "Power level",
			"description": "Power level of the weapon",
			"example": "1",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"durability": {
			"label": "Durability",
			"description": "Maximum normal durability of the weapon",
			"example": "700",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"damagetype": {
			"label": "Damage type",
			"description": "Type of damage the weapon does",
			"example": "Crush",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"attackstyle": {
			"label": "Weapon attack style",
			"type": "string"
		},
        "basedmg": {
			"label": "Base damage",
			"description": "Internal value that determines the damage values of the weapon",
			"example": "7-13",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"damagemulti": {
			"label": "Weapon damage multiplier",
			"description": "Internal value that determines the damage values of the weapon",
			"example": "1.9",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"criticalchance": {
			"label": "Critical hit chance",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"combo": {
			"label": "Hit combo number",
			"description": "Number of hits in the maximum hit combo",
			"example": "3",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"specialaction": {
			"label": "Special action",
			"description": "The name of the special action of the weapon. Describe special attacks in more detail in the article.",
			"example": "Special Attack",
			"type": "string",
			"default": "Special Attack"
		},
		"block": {
			"label": "Block",
			"description": "Weapon block value",
			"example": "13",
			"type": "number"
		},
        "reloadspeed": {
			"label": "Reload speed",
			"description": "Reload speed (attach 'seconds' next to value)",
			"example": "1.0",
			"type": "number"
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing a weapon",
	"paramOrder": [
		"power",
		"durability",
		"damagetype",
		"attackstyle",
        "basedmg",
		"damagemulti",
		"block",
		"criticalchance",
		"combo",
		"specialaction",
        "reloadspeed"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>}}
